title: Tip of the week #4: Use conditional colouring to add emphasis to your data!
excerpt:
Remember conditional formatting in Excel, folks? Well monday.com takes that feature to the next level. 
Keeping with the colouring theme, use conditional colouring to apply colours to cells that match your specified crit…

posts.author: arubinomunoz (Amalia Rubino @Upscale (part of The Adaptavist Group))
posts.cookedHtml:
Remember conditional formatting in Excel, folks? Well monday.com takes that feature to the next level.

Keeping with the colouring theme, use conditional colouring to apply colours to cells that match your specified criteria. This will help you to easily separate the information on your board or add visual emphasis to your data.

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml: Thanks for sharing Amalia!

posts.author: edwardo (Eddie Olmos)
posts.cookedHtml: Is there any update on having these conditional colors be part of the Excel exports? Even a PDF export would be helpful containing the colors to export current board statuses.

posts.author: arubinomunoz (Amalia Rubino @Upscale (part of The Adaptavist Group))
posts.cookedHtml: Hi Eddie! We dont have the ability to update monday.com features as we are monday.com partners. But if this is a feature you would like for them to develop, then I suggest creating a feature request!
